## What & why

<!-- A short description of the change and the motivation. Link issues with "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / build / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./...`, `go vet ./...` and `go test ./...` pass locally
- [ ] Code is `gofmt`-formatted and `golangci-lint` is clean
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing (README / `hivemind-doc`)
- [ ] Breaking changes are called out below
